since_last: 54% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.72%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +0.74% · Gold +0.46% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 54% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.72%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.72%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.15%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BIDU is the standout at -4.37%
cards.body: Leaders: EQIX +2.43%, ADBE +2.38%, ADBE +2.38%, AVAV +2.36%, CRWD +2.06%. Laggards: BIDU -4.37%, CEVA -3.32%, DELL -2.77%, ARM -2.66%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.59% at $156.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.59% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
